attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.FULLY_QUALIFIED_TABLE_NAME, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.TRAIL_POSITION, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.TOKEN, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.REFRESH_DAY, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_ID, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_NUMBER, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.CREATION_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.CREATED_BY, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_DESCRIPTION, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_PRODUCT_TYPE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_BRAND_CODE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_STATUS, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_DLVRY_METHOD, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_POC, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_TECHNOLOGY, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.TNE_COST_MULTIPLIER, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.DLVRY_QTY_MULTIPLIER, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.PREF_PRICE_MARGIN, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_LAUNCH_DATE, TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_AVAILABILITY,1,4000)), CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_POSSIBLE_LAUNCH_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_EOL_FLAG, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_EOL_ACTUAL_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.REF_GPL_CODE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.POP_MODEL_TEMPLATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.PARENT_SKU_ID, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LABOR_RATE_FLAG, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LOCKED_BY 
FROM
 $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS 
WHERE
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS)

SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_PRODUCT_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_BRAND_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_DLVRY_METHOD, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_POC, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_TECHNOLOGY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.TNE_COST_MULTIPLIER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.DLVRY_QTY_MULTIPLIER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.PREF_PRICE_MARGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_LAUNCH_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_AVAILABILITY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_POSSIBLE_LAUNCH_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_EOL_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SVC_EOL_ACTUAL_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.REF_GPL_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.POP_MODEL_TEMPLATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.PARENT_SKU_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LABOR_RATE_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.LOCKED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS,
(
select SKU_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS
minus
select SKU_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.SKU_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.SKU_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_SKU_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME
